case_title: VAL D. HORNSTEIN VS. AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE: FRANK MECKLENBURG) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HORNSTEIN, VAL D. AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS TOWING & QA FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HORNSTEIN, VAL D.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,543.31 FILED BY HORNSTEIN, VAL D. AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HORNSTEIN, VAL D.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL 8/19/22-SUBMITTED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-30-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VAL D. HORNSTEIN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN (VP EMERITUS TOWING & QA). DEFENDANT WAIVE SERVICES. COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF TO BRING IN SURVEILLANCE FOOTAGE CLIP AT THE NEXT HEARING. DEFENDANT ALSO TO MAIL COPY OF EXHIBITS TO PLAINTIFF. COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF ZOOM ON NEXT APPEARANCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
